element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Players learn each turtle acts as extra life; switching strategy essential for progression
Players navigate maze-like overhead sections to locate entry points to side-scrolling combat areas
Main action sequences where combat difficulty increases progressively through areas
Basic foot soldiers encountered first; mini-bosses appear in later areas
Escalating difficulty with unique boss patterns; Shredder as final confrontation
Final fortress level with accumulated challenge; unused mini-Technodrome graphics suggest scrapped complexity

typical_relief_triggers: Turtle defeated / captured but recovers as extra life
Return to overhead exploration from side-scroll combat
typical_tension_triggers: Accumulating enemy waves without breathing room
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Cyclical oscillation between exploration (lower tension overhead sections) and combat (escalating tension side-scrolling segments); each area builds toward boss confrontation

difficulty_curve.early_game: Gentle introduction with basic foot soldiers and simple overhead navigation; single turtle loss manageable
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Escalating enemy density and mini-boss encounters; strategic turtle-switching becomes necessary
difficulty_curve.late_game: Convergence of difficulty: complex overhead maze sections paired with intense combat; multiple turtle losses possible
notable_spikes: Technodrome final stage requiring surviving accumulated difficulty

notable_level_patterns.description: Each area follows: overhead exploration maze → multiple side-scrolling combat segments with escalating enemy waves → area-specific boss → cutscene transition
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Area 2 (Japanese version features door-open sound effect in cutscene)

notable_level_patterns.description: Defeated turtles are captured (similar to NES game design of extra lives); player retains ability to select any turtle at stage boundaries
Boss encounters occur in dedicated arena spaces separate from regular combat sections; Shredder final battle emphasizes isolation and escalated threat
Overhead areas serve as level gates requiring navigation to unlock access to side-scrolling combat progression; rewards exploration with shortcut discovery
